resources.string: Finish your weekly goal and hit your streak.
Choose a program and plan your training
We built a beginner program to guide you step by step.
You\'ve finished this program. Time for the next challenge.
Every journey starts with one step
Every journey starts with a single step
Welcome back. Let\'s build momentum again
Halfway there. You are doing great.
Rest day. Take it easy and recover.
We can continue from where you left off or start the week fresh.
Good effort. You are building a habit.
Complete a Body Scan to get your personal fitness level and a program built just for you.
We are personalizing your program. This takes just a moment.
Your body grows during rest. Stay hydrated and stretch.
Light activity today — walk, stretch, or foam roll.
You finished the program! Take the Body Scan to measure your progress and unlock the next level.
Complete a Body Scan to update your level and get a new personalized plan.
You\'ve completed some exercises. Results will still be saved.
Add at least one exercise to start training
Based on your performance, we\'ve updated your next workout:
Select at least one exercise to start
Video access permission is needed to analyze exercise videos
Complete a workout to see your report here
Start an exercise to see your history
Master your form with real-time feedback.
Start your first workout to see history here
Sign in to continue your fitness journey
Start perfecting your form today with AI-powered correction.
By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password.
Check your email for the reset link.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Our AI analyzes your exercise form in real-time, providing instant feedback to help you train safely and effectively.
Position your phone correctly. Place it 2–3 meters away to see your full body.
View detailed reports, track improvements, and achieve your fitness goals faster.
Upgrade to unlock advanced reports and more.
Pick the plan that fits your training and switch anytime.
Pay safely through MyFatoorah or your Google Play account.
Your access remains active until %1$s. You can cancel renewal anytime.
You will keep Pro access until your current period ends.
Get advanced reports, personalized plans, and premium training insights.
Your Pro access is active until %1$s.
We are waiting for payment confirmation. Pull to refresh in a few seconds.
This plan has no Google Play product for the selected period
Complete payment in the browser, then pull to refresh
Are you sure you want to log out?
No instructions available for this exercise.
This workout is a template. Use Programs to train.
Exercises alternate every %1$d rep(s) with %2$d sec rest between switches.
Exercises alternate every %1$d rep(s) with no rest between switches.
Keep your chest up and back straight.
Lower hips until thighs are parallel to floor.
Push through heels to return to standing.
No errors detected. You\'re doing great!
Controls how often the live coach speaks during camera training.
Camera training uses spoken feedback only. Video review uses text feedback only.
Heavy model is more accurate but slower
Camera permission is required for pose detection
Adjust the weight for this exercise before starting.
Weight must be at least %1$.1f kg
Weight must be at most %1$.1f kg
Adjust reps, duration, or weight before starting. Values are saved for your account.
Amazing session. Your form and focus were strong.
Great job. You made real progress today.
Good effort. Keep going and you will build momentum.
Ready to begin? One small step today is enough.
I completed %1$d/%2$d sets in %3$02d:%4$02d with %5$d%% quality.
Great job. Your form stayed solid.
Nice try. You will improve quickly.
Tip: Maintain the same pace next time.
Tip: Focus on control through the last reps.
Tip: Slow down and prioritize form.
You can continue later, but this session will be incomplete.
Slow breath in, slow breath out.
Quality beats speed. You are doing great.
Focus on control for the next round.
Next up: stay steady and smooth.
Session data is invalid. Please sync and try again.
Failed to load exercise. Please return and adjust the session.
This phase cannot be resumed — restarting from the beginning.
Resume window expired — restarting this phase from the beginning.
Your results are saved. Open the report for the full breakdown.
Choose a training program to start your journey
Your muscles grow while you rest. Enjoy it!
📈 Your form is improving! Keep it up.
💪 Great start! Keep the momentum going.
Workouts and exercises in one place.
See your form, trends, and milestones.
Your active program and weekly workouts.
Complete your first workout to see reports
We are collecting your sessions, form scores, and progress trends.
Complete a training session and your form, consistency, records, and exercise insights will appear here.
Start a plan to unlock reports
Reports work best when your sessions are connected to a training plan, so progress can be measured week by week.
Upgrade to track form trends, exercise progress, milestones, and coaching insights across your training history.
Check your connection and try again. If the issue continues, your cached report data will appear when available.
Rest day — your body recovers and grows stronger.
You\'ve completed the program. Look how far you\'ve come!
This planned workout will be removed from today\'s plan. You can reset to original anytime.
This item will be removed from the session.
Try a different keyword or clear some filters.
Select a program to plan your training
Rest days are built in. If you miss a training day, continue on the next scheduled day—your progress follows the calendar.
Saved on this device — will sync when you\'re back online
Choose a workout to get started
You are currently in %1$s (%2$d%% complete). Switching will archive your current progress. Continue?
Could not verify enrollment. Try again.
Plan paused — your calendar is frozen until you resume.
Exercise unavailable — tap swap to substitute
Nothing to skip — main work already comes first.
Start your journey by choosing a program from the Explore tab.
Couldn\'t save your profile. Please try again.
This helps us tailor your training to you.
Used to estimate loads and track your progress.
New to training, or returning after a long break.
You train regularly and know the basics.
We\'ll prioritize it in your plan.
Lift heavier and build raw power.
Pick the days you can train.
We\'ll match exercises to your setup.
Select everything you have access to.
You can change any of this later in your profile.
I confirm I\'m in good health with no medical condition that prevents me from exercising, and I take responsibility for training within my limits.
